observable_description: CD8+ T cell density in untreated PDAC tumors at baseline (before any treatment). Looking for cell counts per mm^2 or cells per gram of tumor tissue.
TGF-beta concentration in PDAC tumor microenvironment. Looking for measurements in tumor interstitial fluid, tumor lysates, or tumor-conditioned media.
Tumor volume doubling time for untreated PDAC. Looking for measurements from imaging studies (CT, MRI) tracking tumor growth over time.
Fraction of CD4+ T cells that are regulatory T cells (Tregs, CD4+CD25+FoxP3+) within the tumor microenvironment. Looking for flow cytometry or IHC data.
